item.title: I love this for them! To have someone notice you, without putting pressure on to be magically better but noticing the little things can mean everything!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Banana
item.description:
I guess it is banana day. so i will post for trophy. falling off posting and pretty much everything online aside from gaming cause its too much. barely keeping my stuff irl together because well *gestures vaguely at everything*. so here are the memes that came up when i searched my memes for banana. enjoy.
is. is there an option for bone in bananas?
mhmm. going to be doing a grocery order thing soon and it is such a process.
someone fixed the above one for others preferences.
please? only one person i wanna do dis with tho. you know who you are. usually put copypasta stuff at the end of my posts and dont feel like it. dunno if i will post anymore soon. will be around in my discord for gaming. been sucked into learning satisfactory and do have a nice lil server going for that. probably helldivers 2 on friday night like usual.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: Repost because It’s Carpathia Day!
item.description: I almost missed it but thanks to tax day in the USA, I just remembered that today was the day when a group of heroes did their very best to save people’s lives. Note: I have some strong (and generally stupid) opinions on the Titanic BUT this post is about the helpers that Mr Roger’s talks about, not the Titanic.
item.dc:creator: DownvotesStarWars

item.title: What Happened Today #75
item.description: The crackdown is here. Trump’s regime isn’t waiting for permission. They are punishing, blacklisting, and threatening anyone who resists. A whistleblower gets drone-stalked. A protester was tased to cheers at Marjorie Taylor Greene's town hall meeting on Tuesday night. The AP's victory was short-lived because all wire services got punished. And court orders? Still ignored. This isn’t politics. It’s authoritarian control in broad daylight. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/xinis-testimony 2. https://go.govbrief.today/caldwell-leak 3. https://go.govbrief.today/wireservice-pool 4. https://www.npr.org/2025/04/16/nx-s1-5366368/hong-kong-post-office-tariffs 5. https://go.govbrief.today/exempt-cleanair 6. https://go.govbrief.today/harvard-threatened 7. https://go.govbrief.today/susman-order 8. https://go.govbrief.today/irs-shapely 9. https://go.govbrief.today/armyaf-libraries 10. https://go.govbrief.today/climate-funding 11. https://go.govbrief.today/labor-grants-dei 12. https://go.govbrief.today/rikers-ice 13. https://go.govbrief.today/justice-social-media 14. https://go.govbrief.today/irs-deferrals 15. https://go.govbrief.today/soda-candy-snap 16. https://go.govbrief.today/nlrb-whistleblower 17. https://go.govbrief.today/mtg-townhall
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Moving forward
item.description: When I started I needed my walker to transport 10kg dumbbell now I'm walking with the 20kg plate! #inspirational #gym #motivation
item.dc:creator: duffieldious018

item.title: During Word War 2,Britain dressed up this corpse as a fake spy and dropped him in the sea to trick the Nazis - it was called 'Operation Mincemeat.'They planted fake invasion plans on a dead body dressed as a British officer and let it wash up in Spain.
item.description: During Word War 2, Britain dressed up this corpse as a fake spy and dropped him in the sea to trick the Nazis - it was called 'Operation Mincemeat.' They planted fake invasion plans on a dead body dressed as a British officer and let it wash up in Spain. The Nazis took the bait, moved their troops to the wrong place, and the Allies invaded Sicily with much less resistance.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Life is a Death Cult
item.description: The internet loves free stuff, but free for you often means unpaid for creators. Webcomics are the result of hours, sometimes days, of labor. Patreon is what bridges the gap between „free“ and „fair.“ By supporting us, you’re keeping this wild, weird thing alive. Thank you for being part of it. PS: https://www.patreon.com/warandpeas
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: Did anyone see that same comment?
item.dc:creator: beevos

item.title: WEDNESDAY DUMP #721 (+ MY GAME IS OUT TODAY)
item.description:
1. Have they done a movie or a show together already?! If not, they should!
2. When you playing RDR2 too much and you get attached to your horsey
3. Proper workout angle
4. If you are reading this, you are HOT tho
5
6
7. I guess it's time for her to reveal her true self since she got him locked down
8
9
10. Being at a party with your colleagues (you all work from home)
11. That one person who seems to have is life together
12. NOW THIS IS THE TYPE OF CONTENT I COME ON IMGUR FOR
13. Professor: Did you finish your project? The Boys: No. Professor: Why? The Boys:
14. Live footage of me fixing bugs in a game that is already out on Steam
15. So yeah if you've made it to the end of this dump I would like to say that finally my wacky game, that took two chaotic years to make is getting DUMPED on Steam today!We actually made it on the Front Page in Popular Upcoming (thanks to you crazy imgurian family). I've included some (totally real) reviews too! Thank you for all the support guys, gals, giraffes, ducks, possums, foxes, cats and dogs! You have been great and kind an supportive! https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Tiny li'l Midweek Dumpy Doo
item.description:
Better than George R. R. Martin
Pfft. She once hovered in the air dancing to "Jump in the line" while a ghost football team danced on the stairs behind her.
Do you want The Last of Us? Because this is how you get The Last of Us.
At least SOMETHING productive came out of it.
It's a vicious cycle.
It's smaller on the outside
Clever girl
"I'm here with local octopus Otto Tentacleson, who was just released on bail from assaulting a starfish, who wished to remain anonymous. Otto, what are your thoughts?"
Ctrl+S FTW
item.dc:creator: ddubya42

item.title: Is it to late to post among us memes?
item.dc:creator: WoodfolkFae

item.title: I don't know if I'm doing parenting right but damn did this make me feel like I'm doing alright.
item.description: Oh, as a side note, I'm a divorced dad, I get my daughter every weekend. It's still hard not seeing her every day, but it happened a while ago, so you kinda get used to it. But damn these kinds of messages make me feel good.
item.dc:creator: lucasmacdonald81101

item.title: A guy came to a shelter to choose a cat, but the cat chose him first
item.description: "Orange creature, I too, am orange. Let me mark you. You will accept me, and we will go be orange together."
item.dc:creator: maanviFlyer
